articles.title: Serie A, the 35th matchday will end tomorrow: two matches scheduled

articles.title: Rome, Gasperini scathing about the relationship with Massara: "We will talk about it at the right time and in the right ways"
articles.summary: (ANSA) - ROME, MAY 03 - "The presence of Corbin Friedkin is certainly a sign that the ownership is starting to move, not only for the championship finale, but also for the future."

articles.title: Alex Ferguson feels ill at Old Trafford and is taken to hospital as a precaution
articles.summary: (ANSA) - ROME, MAY 03 - Sir Alex Ferguson fell ill at Old Trafford shortly before the Premier League match between Manchester United and Liverpool.

articles.title: Milan attack: the disturbing fact. No more third-tier players. Without Champions League, revolution?
articles.summary: Milan entered a crisis at the worst time to do so and will now live the next three weeks with that anxiety that we have come to know well in recent years.

articles.title: Milan, Allegri: "Our worst match of the season"
articles.summary: - REGGIO EMILIA, 03 MAY - "This was our worst match of the season, a match conditioned by the fact that we were down to ten men, in addition to the goal scored after a few minutes".

articles.title: Inter champions: the congratulatory post from Milan arrives
articles.summary: AC Milan through a short post on their "X" account thus congratulates Inter for the victory of their 21st scudetto, which arrived this evening at the end of the 2-0 match against Parma.

articles.title: Fragile Milan, Padovan has few doubts: "He did what he could.."
articles.summary: Regarding the season of the Bigs and in particular that of Milan, the journalist and commentator Giancarlo Padovan expressed himself thus on Radio Radio.

articles.title: The last goal by a Milan striker dates back to two months ago: the data in detail
articles.summary: Even today, Milan didn't score. Even against Sassuolo the Rossoneri attackers were left without a goal, prolonging a fast that rivals the Lenten one.

articles.title: Milan transfer market, Moretto: "Milan confirm their position on Konè, he is a player that Allegri likes a lot"
articles.summary: Matteo Moretto, journalist and market expert, spoke on his YouTube channel regarding Milan's next transfer moves.

articles.title: Serie A, the updated standings after the postponement on Sunday evening
articles.summary: Below is the updated ranking at the end of the evening postponement between Inter and Parma.

articles.title: Serie A, Inter wins the scudetto by beating Parma 2-0
articles.summary: Chivu's Inter celebrate their 21st scudetto by beating Parma 2-0 at San Siro. Thuram and Henrikh Mkhitaryan scored late in the second half.

articles.title: Brocchi: "Milan, who in all their players want the ball only on their feet, no one attacks the space. They don't have quick thinking"
articles.summary: Milan disappointing in the result but above all in the performance. An atavistic problem of this team continues: the players who don't make movements and always only ask for the ball on their feet, making life easy for the opposing defenders.

articles.title: M.Orlando on Italian football: "Here everything depends on the result, elsewhere the game also counts"
articles.summary: Massimo Orlando, on TMW Radio, spoke about Italian football like this: "I believe that Italian coaches are good, they live in a context of incredible fear here in Italy, it all depends on the result.

articles.title: Only two players have scored more goals than Berardi for Milan in Serie A
articles.summary: Milan today conceded a goal from Domenico Berardi, once again. To be exact, for the twelfth time.

articles.title: Gabbia: "We have to lick our wounds. This defeat must hurt us but it must unite us even more to reach our goal"
articles.summary: Matteo Gabbia was interviewed by DAZN after today's humiliating defeat against Sassuolo.

articles.title: Allegri: "I have always said that I would be very happy to win the Champions League even on the last day"
articles.summary: Milan loses against Sassuolo and the Champions League is back in jeopardy. The fans are worried, the environment is not very serene and the team will have to be good at isolating themselves so as not to throw away the good things they have done during the season.

articles.title: Jashari disappoints, Brocchi: "That player who thrilled everyone last season and who hasn't been seen at Milan yet must return"
articles.summary: Everyone expected something more from Ardon Jashari, now the starter due to Modric's injury, but the Swiss collapsed like the rest of the team.

articles.title: Allegri: "Unfortunately it's such a moment. We threw in a wildcard"
articles.summary: Mister Massimiliano Allegri was interviewed by DAZN at the end of the humiliating 2-0 defeat against Sassuolo. This is an excerpt of his statements after the race.

articles.title: Milan, the second half of the season is a nightmare. Relegation attack, worrying roadmap
articles.summary: The numbers of the last five days, combined with those of the second round, describe an almost desolate scenario. Despite everything, the Rossoneri are still within the top four places, but the drop in performance is very worrying.

articles.title: Inter, Marotta is unperturbed: "Referee investigation? I won't add anything compared to last week. We acted with the utmost correctness"
articles.summary:
Speaking like this before the Inter-Parma match, Nerazzurri president Giuseppe Marotta returns, so to speak, to the Italian referees' investigation:
